description_long: This information point consists of two upright rectangular signboards and two adjacent soft-serve ice cream machines. The signboards feature vibrant, high-resolution graphics advertising different soft-serve flavors, with prominent branding and product imagery. The machines are metallic with black control panels and dispensing nozzles, designed for public interaction. The signboards are supported by sturdy bases, ensuring stability in high-traffic urban environments. The overall setup is clean, modern, and visually appealing, drawing attention with its bright blue and white color scheme. The combination of signage and functional machines makes it both an information and service point.
description: A modern information point with two tall advertising signboards and two metallic soft-serve ice cream machines, featuring bright graphics and a clean, inviting design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both signboards with product images and branding, and the full interface of the two ice cream machines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the machines and the slim profile of the signboards.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the signboards with additional branding and the plain backs of the machines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the signboards and the side panels of the machines.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features large, high-contrast printed graphics with photographic images of soft-serve ice cream and beverages, accented by bold branding and clean, sans-serif typography. The machines have smooth metallic panels with black plastic control surfaces and minimalistic detailing.
